creator: sobomax@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Kubilay Kocak from comment #4)

Kubilay, I can do small tweaks to the port that's not a problem. However, my ports commit bit have been somewhat unexpectedly taken for "safekeeping" last November, so that QA steps are nearly impossible for me to achieve and I won't be able to commit my changes either. I tried to contact portmgr@ to get it re-instantiated back in December but got no reply whatsoever. So I am not quite sure if I need to ask somebody to help me with that QA.
